evidence_rows.reading: V1.12D opened lawfully as a first sidecar execution phase.
The first same-dataset black-box comparison now exists and can be judged against the known baseline.

interpretation: V1.12D succeeds once the first black-box sidecar comparison runs under the same dataset and validation split.
That is enough to close the phase without widening scope or opening deployment.
The next lawful move is owner review of whether the sidecar changes decision value enough to continue.
